title: [SV] Add sv.attributes support to assign op
body:
Following https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/761b6107e78f8ef89576754731ff5367a1b9060f, this commit adds sv.attributes support to the assign op.

One nontrivial change I made is that assign with SV attributes prevent canonicalization of wire op 
that bypasses single assignment. This was necessary to preserve attributes but I'm not sure it is best solution.  
Alternatively we can add symbols to wire op to prevent optimizations.
